title: rhododendron guihainianum
intro: Rhododendron guihainianum, also known as the Guizhou rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of Rhododendron guihainianum have been used in herbal medicine, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, to treat various ailments due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Rhododendron guihainianum include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and aiding in digestion. Rhododendron guihainianum can be prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to make a herbal remedy, or dried and used in capsule or tablet form.
